data-budget-note: Precheck uses smoke JSONL only to validate the formal seed3 training entry; formal target remains 50k Phi_calib-aligned caption records.
training-budget-note: Precheck is a 2-step GPU0 sanity run under the same high-rank LoRA topology intended for formal seed3.
objective-note: Contract target is VASM-masked next-token cross-entropy matching Phi_calib; precheck verifies plumbing, checkpointing, and reload only.
